candidates.name: Postgres Explain Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Renders PostgreSQL query plans as interactive tree diagrams directly in the browser. Parses standard EXPLAIN format. Database devs desperately need better tooling.
candidates.pain: Developers struggle to parse raw PostgreSQL EXPLAIN ANALYZE output when optimizing slow queries.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: CI Failure Category Tagger
candidates.pitch: Classifies CI failure logs by error type and suggests owners based on git blame. Integrates with GitHub Actions API. Speeds up incident response significantly.
candidates.pain: Developers waste hours triaging CI failures because logs lack categorization and prioritization.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GCP Bill Spike Sentinel
candidates.pitch: Statistical anomaly detection on GCP billing exports with browser notifications. Uses GCP Billing API. High demand as companies scale cloud spend.
candidates.pain: Engineers get blindsided by unexpected GCP bills when anomalies go undetected until month-end.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Notion Change Audit Trail
candidates.pitch: Polls Notion API for page revision history and surfaces changes in a floating panel. Simple integration. Teams using Notion as docs infrastructure need this badly.
candidates.pain: Teams lose track of who changed what in Notion, making compliance audits and conflict resolution painful.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: TypeScript Dead Type Overlay
candidates.pitch: Leverages TypeScript compiler API to scan loaded pages and overlay unused types in devtools. Quick build with mature tooling. Fills the gap between linting (pre-commit) and runtime debugging.
candidates.pain: Developers ship unused TypeScript types that bloat bundles and cause confusing runtime errors.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: PyPI Safety Score Overlay
candidates.pitch: Overlays PyPI metadata, last publish date, and known vulnerabilities when visiting package pages. Leverages PyPI JSON API. Supply chain security is top-of-mind.
candidates.pain: Developers risk supply chain attacks by installing PyPI packages without checking maintenance health.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Webhook Delivery Heatmap
candidates.pitch: Visualizes webhook success/failure rates as a calendar heatmap from captured network traffic. No backend needed. Built entirely in-browser.
candidates.pain: Devs cannot see webhook delivery patterns over time without custom logging infrastructure.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: CSS Layer Winner Inspector
candidates.pitch: Visualizes which cascade layers are winning for any element with a breakdown panel. Built on existing DevTools protocol. Chrome 99+ support makes this timely.
candidates.pain: Debugging CSS cascade layer conflicts requires manually tracing specificity across dozens of files.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Competitor Site Visit Alert
candidates.pitch: First-party tracking pixel injected via browser extension detects visits to competitor domains. No GDPR friction since it's opt-in. Unique angle vs saturated third-party intent tools.
candidates.pain: Sales reps miss the best time to reach prospects who are actively evaluating competitors.

candidates.name: SaaS Pricing Tier Monitor
candidates.pitch: Scheduled scraping of competitor pricing pages with diff alerts. Browser extension gives easy opt-in data collection. Direct competitor intelligence gap.
candidates.pain: Sales teams waste time manually checking competitor pricing pages that change without notice.

candidates.name: Job Listing Tech Fingerprint
candidates.pitch: Extracts and normalizes tech mentions from job posting pages using NLP. Scrapes job boards for enrichment data. Saves hours of manual research.
candidates.pain: AEs spend hours reading job postings to infer prospect tech stacks for personalized outreach.

candidates.name: Sales Deck Slide Momentum Score
candidates.pitch: Tracks time spent on each slide in browser-based decks and benchmarks against top-performing reps. Screen time API enables this. Competitive intelligence for sales.
candidates.pain: Sales reps do not know which slides resonate versus which ones lose buyer attention in demos.
